claim: Every artifact the methodology generates MUST recursively inherit the doc-test-code form: EVERY EntityType MUST yield a Go struct, its lifecycle methods, and transition tests; EVERY SETTLED requirement MUST yield a named Go test case (a real assertion when formalizable, an honest skip carrying the rule text otherwise).
evidence: confront run 2026-07-15 (no real semantic conflict; strongest hit R-agent-conduct-is-rules-not-tests score 4 is a distinct claim about ENFORCED/PROSE separation for agent conduct
why: Dogfooding gen-code (PLAN-gen-code.md stage 0): the methodology must apply its own doc-test-code discipline recursively to everything it generates, not only to hand-written code.
